learned: FACT: Odoo 19 pos.order in state=paid REJECTS state writes to draft/cancel — must operate forward (refund order) not backward (cancel original). FACT: pos.payment.write({payment_method_id}) is canonical Odoo-19-safe for PM swap on paid orders in an open session — propagates through computed chain correctly. FACT: raw pos.order.create() bypasses sync_from_ui — leaves amount_paid=0 (stored field) requiring explicit write. FACT: D1 pos_orders_mirror is NCH-only (sales_sync_state seeds are nch_*), HE corrections need no D1 invalidation. FACT: HE session 268 (Cash Counter) + 269 (Captain) have been open since 2026-05-20 — sessions in HE POS are long-lived, not daily-closed.

what_you_did: Applied STRUCTURAL-ORIGINAL date model on bills 3/4/5 (refunds 8058/8059/8054 + payments 8095/8096/8092). date_order and payment_date both set to original+1min. learned: FACT: pos.order.date_order is writable on state=paid orders in open sessions (Odoo 19) via direct write. FACT: pos.payment.payment_date is independently writable; must be synced with order date_order to keep journal-day consistent.

learned: FACT: gh pr diff reports merge-base diff (correct) while local git diff origin/main..HEAD reports HEAD-vs-current-tip (includes intervening main deletions, misleading). Use gh pr diff to decide merge safety, not local diff stat. FACT: hr_attendance_daily.is_single_punch=1 is the canonical ambiguity flag set by CAMS ingest — no need to recompute client-side. FACT: env.DASHBOARD_KEY doubles as HMAC secret for staff link tokens; rotation invalidates all existing share URLs (acceptable since admin can mint fresh ones). FACT: Cloudflare Pages git-connected deploy from main push takes ~30s to land — verified by curl test post-merge.

learned: FACT: gh --delete-branch on a PR that is the BASE of another open PR closes that child PR; GitHub will not reopen a PR whose base branch was deleted ('Could not open the pull request'). For stacked PRs, merge child→retarget→delete, or recreate child via cherry-pick onto the post-merge base. FACT: advance-payment path (₹ button + hr_advance_paid_v1 WABA auto-fire) is fully live on main since #215 — independent of #218/#220.

learned: FACT: chicken_daily_ledger has NO automatic daily ingest — rows exist only when admin runs ?action=backfill-ledger (pulls MN POs from odoo.hnhotels.in company_id=2) OR a day is hand-saved via save-day-prices. A cash-bill day with no Odoo PO produces nothing and silently vanishes from the price-entry queue. This is the structural reason 'live data isn't coming per day'. FACT: trust-check gaps[] only lists dates present in ledger OR odoo (union) — fully-absent days (no PO + no ledger) don't even appear as gaps, masking them. FACT: MN Broilers vendor partner_id=33 in odoo.hnhotels.in. FACT: laptop git push to github HTTPS can fail for ~20min while curl GET to github still returns 200 (upload POST blocked, reads pass) — toggling VPN/Tailscale clears it.

FACT: clean unblock without dirty upload = POST .../deployments -F branch=main (rebuilds latest main from connected repo, ~1min). FACT: hn-hotels-site config = production_branch main, production_deployments_enabled true, build_command empty (~8s deploys), preview_deployment_setting 'all' + includes ['*'] (every AI-tool branch push = a preview build). FACT: only 618 files/90MB are git-tracked (ship to prod); _context/ 1.1GB zip + 100-500MB jsonl are gitignored so git builds are clean — but a wrangler direct-upload from the working tree would choke on them (the he-direct-settlement orphan trap).

(1) Verified Fast2SMS API key live: HE_FAST2SMS_FAST2SMS_API_KEY (80ch) → wallet ₹135, 540 SMS credits, return:true. (2) Fixed entity_id on ALL dlt_templates rows from stale 'BL-1400079296' → real '1401667060000079296' (hn-hiring D1, wrangler --remote). (3) Registered new row hr_advance_paid_sms_v1: header HNHTLS, category service, 4 vars, body 'HNHTLS: Hi {#var#}, advance of Rs.{#var#} received on {#var#} via {#var#}. This will be adjusted in your salary. - HN Hotels', dlt_template_id='TBD', status='pending'. Mirrors live WABA hr_advance_paid_v1.
learned: FACT: BSNL DLT is FULLY set up except content-template approval — PE entity 1401667060000079296 (HN HOTELS PRIVATE LIMITED, reg 11-May-2026, exp 11-May-2027), header HNHTLS Approved+Active (Header ID 1405177971301491169, category Service-Implicit), PE-TM chain 1415177988533034769 → SID GROUPS (TM 1702159738863862112 = Fast2SMS) Approved+Active, entity approved in Fast2SMS. REMAINING: add Sender ID HNHTLS in Fast2SMS DLT Manager + get ≥1 content template approved (6-digit ID) + register it via update-dlt-template. FACT: comms.js 'send' action does NOT pass sender_id/message_id to sendSms — direct DLT-template SMS by name is NOT wired into the send action (only the WABA→SMS fallback path at comms-core ~L569 uses lookupDltTemplate). So test-send-on-approval = direct Fast2SMS /dev/bulkV2 call (I hold key+entity+sender+templateID); durable /ops/hr advance→SMS auto-fire needs a small comms.js PR. FACT: Fast2SMS DLT send route is 'dlt_manual' (sender_id+message+entity_id+template_id); existing comms-core uses route='dlt' w/ message_id — exact param to verify on first live send. FACT: update-dlt-template is UPDATE-only (no insert) — that's why the row was pre-created via wrangler.

event: DLT SMS LIVE — test send succeeded 100% API
what_you_did: Registered approved BSNL content template hr_advance_paid_sms_v1 (DLT Template ID 1407177989016809756, Service-Implicit, header HNHTLS) into D1 dlt_templates with EXACT body match (incl \n\n line breaks, 'Advance' caps, 'HN Hotels' footer — owner reformatted on submit). Fired live test DLT SMS to 7010426808 via Fast2SMS /dev/bulkV2 route=dlt_manual → {return:true, request_id:SpRV8lZgwplwEWQ, 'SMS sent successfully.'}. Full chain verified end-to-end: PE entity + header + PE-TM chain + approved template + Fast2SMS sender all green. 100% API SMS control achieved.
learned: FACT (CONFIRMED LIVE): Fast2SMS DLT send = POST https://www.fast2sms.com/dev/bulkV2, header 'authorization: <key>', params route=dlt_manual + sender_id=HNHTLS + entity_id=1401667060000079296 + template_id=<19-digit DLT content template id> + message=<full rendered text, vars filled, fixed parts MUST match approved template incl newlines> + numbers=<10-digit, no 91>. The param is template_id (NOT message_id) for dlt_manual. dlt_manual does NOT require the content template pre-added to Fast2SMS DLT Manager — entity+sender+chain approval is enough. FACT: DLT content template hr_advance_paid_sms_v1 = ID 1407177989016809756, Service-Implicit, Content Category 'Food and Beverages', 4 vars (alphanumeric,numeric,alphanumeric,alphanumeric). FACT: BSNL approved it ~instantly (service-implicit). GAP: comms-core.js sendFast2SmsSms uses route='dlt' + message_id (NOT dlt_manual + template_id + entity_id) and the comms.js send action doesn't pass these — so DURABLE /ops/hr advance→SMS auto-fire + outbox logging needs a small PR to switch the DLT path to dlt_manual w/ entity_id+template_id. Direct Fast2SMS call works today w/o it.
